task_objective: Prevent stale GAME SAVE UP TO DATE BrowserView content from flashing before VERIFYING GAME SAVE on lifecycle start and exit.
design_decisions: Kept the BrowserView-only status strip architecture.
Hid the reused BrowserView before loading each visible status document to prevent stale HTML flashes.
Added a named 100ms reveal delay guarded by a generation counter so older callbacks cannot show stale state.
Cleared pending show timers on sync, hide, destroy, and dismount.
Destroyed the prior BrowserView surface before lifecycle start and exit checking publishes so VERIFYING GAME SAVE loads into a fresh surface.
results: Added red static regressions first, implemented guarded BrowserView reveal behavior, added lifecycle verification surface resets, and prepared the change for full validation.
